replenishment_policy.instruction: Add new todo tasks ONLY when the pool falls below minimum_todo_tasks. Focus on IntelliTrader (C# crypto trading bot) evolution: improving trading strategies, adding exchange integrations, fixing bugs, and improving the Web dashboard. Read docs/trends.md for inspiration when replenishment is needed.

autonomous_loop_policy.selection_rule: Choose the first todo task that is not blocked by high/critical risk.
autonomous_loop_policy.anti_stall_rule: Never ask the user for the next task while safe low/medium-risk tasks can be generated from IntelliTrader source, failing CI, or TODO comments.
autonomous_loop_policy.failure_rule: If CI fails, prioritize a fix task for the failure before starting new features.

tasks.title: Analyze IntelliTrader architecture and define evolution goals
tasks.description: Perform a deep scan of the C# codebase in IntelliTrader directories. Identify core components, exchange integrations, and trading rules. Create a new document `magda_agent_system/docs/intellitrader_evolution.md` outlining the findings and future improvements.
acceptance: The document describes main C# modules and current state of the bot

tasks.title: Audit existing trading strategies for potential improvements
tasks.description: Review C# files in `IntelliTrader.Trading/Models` and `IntelliTrader.Rules/`. Look for inefficiencies or missing safety checks in Buy/Sell trailing logic. Propose specific tasks to improve these strategies.
acceptance: New tasks related to strategy improvements are added to agent_tasks.json

tasks.title: Plan Web Dashboard enhancements
tasks.description: Analyze `IntelliTrader.Web/` project. Review current views and controllers. Identify opportunities to add more real-time stats or improved log visualization. Document the plan in `magda_agent_system/docs/web_enhancements.md`.
acceptance: magda_agent_system/docs/web_enhancements.md exists with a list of proposed features

tasks.title: Draft plan for Bybit exchange integration
tasks.description: Examine `IntelliTrader.Exchange.Binance` and `IntelliTrader.Exchange.Base`. Outline the steps needed to implement a Bybit provider using `ExchangeSharp`. Document the plan in `magda_agent_system/docs/bybit_integration_plan.md`.
acceptance: Plan document exists with technical details for Bybit integration
